title: Homepage
text:
Download Resume    Download CV 







Research Associate

NORC at the University of Chicago, Public Health Department

Co-authored award-winning grant proposals.
Co-designed survey.
Wrangled largescale qualitative and quantitative datasets in SPSS, NVivo, and MAXQDA.









Graduate Research Assistant

NORC at the University of Chicago, The Bridge

Researched hierarchy formation and its correlation with socioeconomic status.
Assisted PhD candidates in the early development of an original study on the misattribution of arousal.









Undergraduate Researcher

Ich Und Du Lab at DePaul University

Interviewed 20 participants for the rehabilitation of previously incarcerated LGBTQ+IA individuals study.
Quantitative data analysis using STATA for the National Social Life, Health and Aging Project (NSHAP) and the High School and Beyond (HSB) Project, both focused on aging and geriatric populations









Research Intern

Fonselp, Buenos Aires

Conducted partnership outreach, recruiting international nongovernmental organizations and corporations to invest in local Latin American communities.









Research Intern

Junior Achievement, Buenos Aires

Conducted partnership outreach, recruiting international nongovernmental organizations and corporations to invest in local Latin American communities.









Policy Intern

Chicago Ward Alderman

Organized Town Hall meetings between the Alderman and constituents.
Drafted policy memos, took notes for city council meetings, prepped materials for meetings between the Alderman and community organizations and local businesses.

title: Veronica Pletsch

title: Veronica Pletsch
text:
Testimonials

“Not only is she a talented quantitative and qualitative social researcher, but she never skips the opportunity to help an old lady cross the street.”


— my mom, a pretty cool lady


“A terrific research associate, always eager to grow and be challenged. (What I imagine was said in the letter of recommendation wrote for my UChicago application… alas I waived my right to read it. But hey, I got accepted so it had to be good.)”


— former manager, NORC


“That kid’s got gumption, no social or financial barrier has ever stopped her, but boy did they try.”


— Veronica Pletsch (me), Researcher

title: Veronica Pletsch
text:
About Me
Hey there! I’m Veronica, when I’m not giving myself musculoskeletal issues and heart palpitations from being hunched over my computer doing research with 400 milligrams of caffeine in my system, I like to dabble in my hobbies. I love playing with my cat Sabrina who is the size of exactly half a rice cooker and hit the gym as an amateur body builder who can totally deadlift 675lbs.
Thanks for stopping by! While you’re here, please explore my recent research projects, writing samples, and while you’re at it, take a PDF copy of my resume as a souvenir of your trip here.






Lil Mama Sabrina







Definitely me deadlifting and definitely not just my face over bodybuilder Bradley Martyn…
